title: neophloga poivreana
intro: Neophloga poivreana, also known as 'Poivreana', is a plant species native to the island of Mauritius, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neophloga poivreana include relief from digestive issues, reduction of fever, and treatment of skin conditions such as eczema. Neophloga poivreana is used in herbal preparations like infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
